2004-07-24‚Äéxanga. blogger.  xanga.  blogger.  what the heck am i to do?  i keep going between them! fixed my camera, and i'm picking up the jeep today. i'm so giddy i could wet myself.  really.
2004-07-24‚Äéi hate them.  however, they do make  urlLink satire  rather simple!
2004-07-24‚Äéif big sky, montana blows up anytime in the near future, burn all my stuff in a massive sacrificial pyre (i love that word! pyre pyre pyre!) i'll be missing y'all mucho.  adios.

2004-07-24‚Äélook at the resemblance between bill clinton's mom and monica lewinsky in these photographs from a  time  magazine i stole from the expresslube while the changed the tranny fluid in my yak.  isnt the resemblance uncanny?  i suppose he had relations with her on account of she looked like his mom and he has an oedipus complex.  *note: i can't be sued for libel on account of i was just supposing.

2004-07-24‚Äé"you know something?  i though blogger was pure.  xanga is so very sick, contaminated with the babble of people who write alot, but dont say anything, people who add slow-loading 190,000* kbps music files from their flourescent, stereotypical, impossible-to-read formatted blogs, and people who abuse letter/number substitutions and have a spastic caps lock key. unfortunately, there is no cure for dumbass. blogger has been contaminated.  i have only seen one page so far, a 0 for an o, a typical ""[cap][lowercase[cap][lower]..."" pattern, and the site was about what?  nothing.  i am not mean, i will not link.  but this makes me sad, i like blogger.  now it has internet leoprosy.  how sad!"

2004-07-24‚Äé"i am back from pismo, and i have hardly any  urlLink pictures . i think that's because i only photograph certain situations that i find funny, and that is hard to predict. there are some candid ones i am somewhat proud of though. the trip was killer!    ""I'm Gumby, dammit!"""

2004-07-24‚Äéwell, that was a hell of a thing. i'll have some pictures up soon. i had to use xanga for a while on account of i couldn't upload photos on a hellish slow connection. this is photo hosting only now.

2004-07-24‚Äé"okay, the movie as a whole, well, was somewhat lacking.  it definetely had its moments, but the character that made it all worthwhile was Brick, the weatherman.   ""hi, i'm brick.  someday, a doctor will tell me i have an I.Q. of 48, and will be considered by some to be mentally retarded."" (mind you, he is filling a plugged-in toaster with mayonaise [sp?] as he says this.)"
